# FSItem.GetAttributesRequest

**Class**

A request to get attributes from an item.

## Declaration

```swift
class GetAttributesRequest
```

## Overview

Methods that retrieve attributes use this type and inspect the [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSItem/GetAttributesRequest/wantedAttributes] property to determine which attributes to provide. FSKit calls the [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSItem/GetAttributesRequest/isAttributeWanted(_:)] method to determine whether the request requires a given attribute.

## Inspecting requested attributes

- **wantedAttributes**: The attributes requested by the request.
- **isAttributeWanted(_:)**: A method that indicates whether the request wants given attribute.
- **FSItem.Attribute**: A value that indicates a set of item attributes to get or set.

## Working with attributes

- **FSItem.Attributes**: Attributes of an item, such as size, creation and modification times, and user and group identifiers.
- **FSItem.SetAttributesRequest**: A request to set attributes on an item.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCoding
- NSObjectProtocol
- NSSecureCoding
